wargear.Acid Blood: For each unsaved Wound this model suffers during the Melee Phase, inflict one S5 AP- Autohit on the unit responsible for the damage. Resolve as soon as Saves and Feel No Pains are resolved before moving to the next Initiative Step.
wargear.Flesh Hooks: This model is considered to be armed with Grenades for the purpose of charging units in Cover.
wargear.Psychic Barrier: This models gains a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Shield Claws: This model gains Sv-1 (Improves by 1) and a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

Forced Rush Cast 6+.type: Target friendly unit moves 1" per Zoanthrope. This move cannot take any models out of 18

Shadow Node Cast 5+.type: Target unit gains one additional Deny the Witch in the next Psychic Phase per Zoanthrope

Ablative Shield Cast 7+.type: Target unit ignores the next number of Wounds that would be assigned to it equal to the number of Zoanthropes. This effect ends at the start of your next Psychic Phase. Additional Wounds from sources such as Monsterbane count towards this total number ignored.
